title: stevia yaconensis var. yaconensis
intro: Stevia yaconensis var. yaconensis, also known as yacon, is a perennial plant native to South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and used as a sweetener due to its fructooligosaccharides content, which provides a sweetness without calories. The medicinal properties of yacon include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of consuming yacon include weight management, improved blood sugar control, and enhanced gut health due to its prebiotic properties. Yacon can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or syrup, and is also available as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
